description.en: Attacks an enemy. <color=#28d9ed>Heals</color> the ally with the lowest Health by <color=#28d9ed>1.5%</color> of Lyla's Max Health.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、残りHPが最も低い味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を【ライラ】の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>1.5%</color>回復させる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 체력 상황이 가장 나쁜 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 라일라 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>1.5%</color> 만큼 회복시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使生命值最低的友军恢复相当于莱拉生命值上限<color=#28d9ed>1.5%</color>的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>。

description.en:
(Passive Effect) Always reduces the damage taken by allies from attacks that target all allies by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>. 

(Triggered Effect) Upon taking damage from an attack that targets all allies, activates an <color=#28d9ed>Agile Response</color> effect.
Grants all allies <color=#28d9ed>Sustained Recovery</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)味方全体の受けるダメージを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>DOWNさせる。

(発動効果)敵から全体攻撃を受けた場合、<color=#28d9ed>【迅速対応】</color>を発動する。
【迅速対応】:味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>継続回復</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr:
(패시브 효과) 항상 아군들이 전체 공격으로 받는 피해를 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 감소시킵니다.

(발동 효과) 전체 공격 피격 시 <color=#28d9ed>신속 대응</color> 효과가 발동합니다.
아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.zh:
(被动效果)总是使友军所受的全体攻击伤害降低<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

(触发效果)受到全体攻击时,将触发<color=#28d9ed>迅速应对</color>效果。
使全体友军获得<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Grants <color=#28d9ed>Sustained Recovery</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>. Has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to grant <color=#28d9ed>Increased Resilience</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>継続回復</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与し、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>効果抵抗</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: 아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color>동안 부여하고, <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 저항</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 使全体友军获得<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,\n并有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>效果抵抗</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases Speed by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> every time the caster takes a turn. (Max 5 stacks)
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、スピードが<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>UPする。(最大5回まで累積)
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使速度提升<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。(最多可叠加5次)

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, your Priority increases by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分の行動ゲージが<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>増加する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 종료 시 자신의 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>증가합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,自身行动值+<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
